title: WingMan (The Universal Irony of Love)
overview: Omi plods along in the daily tedium working as a matchmaker to urban callers searching for love through the company Wingman. With recent pain inflicted upon him by one-time girlfriend/childhood sweetheart Shikha and seemingly unable to bounce back from it or let it go, Omi makes a decision to pursue another woman, Nisha, who has her own baggage to bear. Will Omi’s choices bring him the solace and love he longs for or drive him further down a path of ungratified despair?
